overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a highway shoulder at night in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily forward under overpasses and alongside moderate traffic, passing graffiti-covered walls and approaching a highway interchange with overhead signage. The scene features artificial street lighting and vehicle headlights illuminating the dark urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder under overpass with graffiti wall

events.description: black sedan passes by on the right with headlights on
graffiti wall ends, transitioning to plain concrete barrier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder under the overpass, staying close to the graffiti-covered wall on the left

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the highway

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in green and orange graffiti illuminated by warm artificial light
massive concrete highway overpass structure creating a tunnel-like enclosure
multi-lane asphalt highway with yellow dividing line
orange sodium vapor street lights mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a highway shoulder beneath a massive concrete overpass at night. The left side features a graffiti-covered wall illuminated by warm artificial lighting, while vehicles pass by on the right. The space feels enclosed and tunnel-like with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with concrete barrier and moderate traffic

events.description: large white pickup truck passes closely on the right
road curves slightly to the left as the highway continues

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the enclosed graffiti section opens up to a more exposed highway environment

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving past in the right lane

entered.detail: large white commercial box truck with headlights illuminating the road
back of highway directional sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the graffiti wall ends, revealing a more exposed highway section with a concrete barrier on the left. Multiple vehicles including trucks and sedans pass by in the right lanes. The overpass structure continues overhead but feels less enclosed than the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with overhead gantry signs

events.description: overhead highway gantry signs become visible indicating an upcoming interchange
white van passes by followed by other vehicles approaching the interchange

agents.ego_description: approaching a highway interchange while walking along the shoulder, with traffic merging and diverging ahead

notable_agents.action: white van driving past as the road widens approaching the interchange

entered.detail: large highway overhead sign gantry spanning across the road indicating exits and directions
highway exit ramp diverging to the right with additional street lighting
urban lights visible in the distance beyond the interchange

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major highway interchange with large overhead gantry signs visible ahead. The road widens and an exit ramp appears on the right. The concrete overpass structure gives way to a more open highway environment with distant city lights visible beyond the interchange. Traffic continues to flow past as the camera moves toward the junction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a highway shoulder that transitions from a confined, tunnel-like underpass into an expansive urban interchange. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past a graffiti-covered wall bathed in warm artificial light while traffic flows closely on the right. As the graffiti wall ends, the environment opens up into a more exposed section of the highway, where the oppressive overhead structure begins to recede and a concrete barrier lines the left side. The scene then expands further as the camera approaches a major junction, with the road widening to reveal an exit ramp and large overhead gantry signs. Finally, the concrete overpass gives way entirely to an open highway environment, revealing distant city lights beyond the interchange as traffic continues to stream past.
